codeReview.summary: The validation feature captured substantial live evidence under the mission `evidence/` tree: before/after snapshots, review-DB URL coverage, archive existence checks, and sampled archive payload verification for both targeted rounds.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and saved evidence for `mm-importer-followup-live-dev-validation`. Result: pass. The artifacts comprehensively cover archive/url reconciliation and patch-only resource/submission/review behavior, and they were useful for spotting the separate description-rerun bug called out in the description-feature reviews.
